channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [GROWINGTON] Growington Ventures Board Meeting on May 7, 2026
item.description:
Growington Ventures India Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 7, 2026, to approve and acknowledge the audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for the quarter and financial year ending March 31, 2026. The trading window for dealing in the company's securities by designated persons is closed from April 1, 2026, and will remain closed until 48 hours after the results are approved and submitted to the stock exchange.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 7, 2026, to approve audited financial results.
  • Consideration of standalone and consolidated financial results for FY26.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours post-results announcement.
  • Meeting to be held at the company's registered office in Navi Mumbai.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Growington Ventures India Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [AML] Ashoka Metcast: Audited Results for FY26 Approved
item.description:
Ashoka Metcast Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, during its meeting held on May 2, 2026. The results were prepared in accordance with Regulation 33 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Audited standalone and consolidated financial results for FY26 approved.
  • Results comply with SEBI's Listing Regulations.
  • Board meeting commenced at 5:30 PM and concluded at 6:00 PM on May 2, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ashoka Metcast Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [QPOWER] Quality Power Board Meeting on May 13, 2026
item.description:
Quality Power Electrical Equipments Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 13, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider recommending a dividend on equity shares. The trading window for designated persons remains closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 13, 2026, to approve audited financial results.
  • Consideration of dividend recommendation for FY26.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours post results declaration.
  • Financial results include standalone and consolidated figures.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Quality Power Electrical Equipments Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [DMART] Avenue Supermarts: Management Changes Announced
item.description:
Avenue Supermarts Ltd. announced changes in its management, including the conclusion of Chandrashekhar Bhave's term as an Independent Director on May 16, 2026. Rohit Mundhra, previously Internal Auditor, will become Regional Head - Operations (Rajasthan) effective May 2, 2026. Ravi Sharma, Head - Risk and Compliance, will also assume the role of Internal Auditor for FY 2026-27. Hitesh Shah will oversee both Pharmacy and Food Businesses as Chief Business Officer, while Stephen Thomas will no longer be a Senior Management Personnel.

  • Chandrashekhar Bhave's term as Independent Director ended on May 16, 2026.
  • Rohit Mundhra appointed as Regional Head - Operations (Rajasthan) from May 2, 2026.
  • Ravi Sharma takes on additional role of Internal Auditor for FY 2026-27.
  • Hitesh Shah re-designated as Chief Business Officer - Pharmacy and Food Services.
  • Stephen Thomas ceases to be Senior Managerial Personnel due to reporting structure change.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Avenue Supermarts Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [ADVENZYMES] Advanced Enzyme Board Meeting on May 9, 2026 for FY26 Results
item.description:
Advanced Enzyme Technologies Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 9, 2026, to consider and approve the Annual Financial Statements (Standalone & Consolidated) for the fiscal year ended March 31, 2026, including the fourth-quarter results. The board will also consider recommending a final dividend for FY26 and/or declaring an interim dividend for FY27. The trading window remains closed until May 11, 2026.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 9, 2026, to approve FY26 financial results.
  • Consideration of final dividend for FY26 and/or interim dividend for FY27.
  • Trading window remains closed until May 11, 2026.
  • Meeting details available on the company and stock exchange websites.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Advanced Enzyme Technologies Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [AMIRCHAND] Amir Chand Jagdish Kumar Incorporates Singapore Subsidiary
item.description:
Amir Chand Jagdish Kumar (Exports) Ltd has announced the incorporation of a wholly-owned subsidiary, Aeroplane FMCG Pte. Ltd., in Singapore. The subsidiary will operate in the Fast-Moving Consumer Goods (FMCG) industry, dealing in rice and FMCG products. The cost of subscription is USD 500 for 500 shares at USD 1 each, representing 100% shareholding by the parent company.

  • Amir Chand Jagdish Kumar forms Aeroplane FMCG Pte. Ltd. in Singapore.
  • The subsidiary will focus on Rice and FMCG products.
  • The company holds 100% stake in the new subsidiary.
  • Subscription cost is USD 500 for 500 shares.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Amir Chand Jagdish Kumar (Exports) Ltd | Category: Subsidiary

item.title: [KANPRPLA] Kanpur Plastipack FY26 Net Profit Up 68% YoY to ₹3,819 Lakh
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Kanpur Plastipack Ltd. announced its audited standalone and consolidated financial results for Q4 and FY26. Total income for FY26 rose by 26% YoY to ₹72,666.79 lakh, while net profit increased by 68% YoY to ₹3,819 lakh. The company reported an increase in domestic sales due to government tenders and is scaling up premium PP yarn applications. FIBC capacity expansion is underway, with 10% achieved ahead of schedule. Commercial production of non-woven products is on track for September 2026.

  • FY26 total income increased by 26% YoY to ₹72,666.79 lakh.
  • FY26 net profit surged 68% YoY to ₹3,819 lakh.
  • Exports contributed approximately 75% of manufacturing revenue in FY26.
  • FIBC capacity expansion is 10% complete, ahead of schedule.
  • Non-woven production to commence by September 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KANPUR PLASTIPACK LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [AML] Ashoka Metcast Approves Audited Financial Results for March 31, 2026
item.description:
Ashoka Metcast Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, during its meeting held on May 2, 2026. The results were reviewed and audited in compliance with Regulation 33 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The audit opinion confirms that the financial results present a true and fair view in conformity with applicable accounting standards.

  • Audited standalone and consolidated financial results approved for FY26.
  • Results comply with Regulation 33 of SEBI Listing Regulations.
  • Audit confirms true and fair view of financial performance.
  • Board meeting commenced at 5:30 PM and concluded at 6:00 PM on May 2, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ashoka Metcast Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [TULSYAN] Tulsyan NEC: Approves Mortgage for ₹50 Cr Credit Facility
item.description:
Tulsyan NEC Ltd's board approved the execution of a registered mortgage for 31.86 acres of unused land at its power plant in favor of a Supplier/Service Provider. This mortgage secures a credit facility of ₹50 Crores, which will support coal supplies, logistics, raw materials, and other services. The credit facility is also backed by a personal guarantee from the Managing Director. The decision was made during the board meeting held on May 02, 2026.

  • Tulsyan NEC secures ₹50 Cr credit via land mortgage.
  • Credit facility supports coal supply and logistics.
  • Mortgage covers 31.86 acres of land in Tamil Nadu.
  • Managing Director provides personal guarantee.
  • Board approved the mortgage on May 02, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TULSYAN NEC LTD.-$ | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [OMAXAUTO] Omax Autos Approves ₹2.5 Interim Dividend for FY26
item.description:
Omax Autos Ltd's board has approved an interim dividend of ₹2.5 per equity share (25%) for the financial year 2025-26. The record date for determining shareholders' eligibility for the dividend is set for May 8, 2026. The decision was made during the board meeting held on May 2, 2026, which commenced at 1:30 P.M. and concluded at 4:03 P.M. The board also approved the audited financial statements for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, and appointed internal auditors for the financial year 2026-27.

  • Omax Autos declares ₹2.5 interim dividend per share for FY26.
  • Record date for interim dividend is set for May 8, 2026.
  • Audited financial statements for FY26 approved by the board.
  • Internal auditors appointed for the financial year 2026-27.
  • Board meeting held on May 2, 2026, to approve key decisions.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: OMAX AUTOS LTD. | Category: Dividend
